Name: -1_dont_poor_likes_doesnt
Representative_Docs: ['I think that when someone has bad taste I mean that their likes have no value that I can perceive. Their likes may also cause harm or at least do no good/provide no benefit.  I think that my friend, Jimmy, has poor taste. His music tastes are poor, low quality songs that require no talent and I do not enjoy.', "Bad taste can be different to everyone, for me it would be something I dislike. An example: if I dislike a piece of art and someone else likes it, I would say this person has bad taste in art.  We don't share the same kinds of music, if anything I think he has a horrible taste in music. I feel like music needs to have meaning or have a message. Most of the music he listens to doesn't have any, which makes it hard to identify with. To me he has a poor taste in music, to him maybe not.", "Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste. My mother has poor taste. We don't like the same things, therefore my opinion of her likes and tastes are poor."]
